name: Sherried Baked Fruit (Modify)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Drain the fruit and arrange it in layers in a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Melt the butter and add the flour, stirring until well blended.
4. Add the brown sugar and sherry, cooking until thick.
5. Pour the mixture over the fruit.
6. Bake for 30 minutes. Serve elegantly at buffet dinner parties, large or small.
